module_mood_contract: Clarity + mildly sobering — student understands WHY the tacit-to-explicit gap exists and that the four sharing strategies design around (not through) the asymmetry. Feeds M7 generosity mood without resolving it; student arrives at M7's exercise with realistic expectations, not dread.

rules_evaluated.evidence: All beats are TEACHING (the whole file is content; no setup/launch/transition beats). Phase scores: Intro 9, Section 1 ('thousand tacit choices') 9 — Polanyi quote and concrete tacit-inventory land cleanly. Section 2 ('implicit trust') 7 — stat lands but '[SOURCE NEEDED]' inline marker in student-visible body text dips the mood. Sections 3–7 each 8. Close 8. No beat below 7. Section 2 is at 7 (facilitator-premium gap); noted as TODO, not blocking.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Section 2: pin the five-survey URLs per maintainer block's open TODO, then remove the '[SOURCE NEEDED]' inline marker. That takes Section 2 from 7 to 9.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Summary explicitly preserves the gap: 'None of them alone closes the gap. Together, they make the gap visible and navigable.' M7 generosity mood (students ask 'should others have this?') is not pre-empted — the supplementary names the gap and the four strategies but does not run the sharing exercise. M7's exercise still carries full weight.

All seven sections now carry substantive prose. Teaching moments: (1) tacit-knowledge thesis (Polanyi quote + concrete inventory) — reliably triggers across SVP HR persona variation; (2) four sharing shapes (Section 5) — each bullet explains the trade, the design question ('which tacit asset does this team need me to hand over?') is the forcing-function reframe; (3) 'vendor pitch not strategy' (Section 6) — framing now supported by argument, not just label. Section 5 is the most load-bearing and lands cleanly. Only fragility: 'Note on provenance: this is a practitioner taxonomy (F-Secure / Neste / Posti cohorts), not research-convergent. Teach it as design, not field consensus.' at line 97 is a trainer-addressed sentence in student-facing body — may slightly undercut confidence in the Section 5 taxonomy at the exact teaching moment. TODO, not blocking.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Move 'Note on provenance… Teach it as design, not field consensus.' below <!-- maintainer -->. In student-facing body, let the closing line of Section 5 stand alone: 'This is a practitioner taxonomy… not a research-convergent pattern. No platform yet has a canonical promotion path. Teach it as design, not field consensus.' — that last clause ('Teach it as design') is addressed to the trainer and should not be visible to the student.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — file honors the module's mood contract and Big Idea.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Strategy M7 Big Idea: 'M7 teaches organisational psychology (the hard part is absorption, not access).' File delivers exactly this across Sections 2 (access-trust gap), 5 (four strategies that work), 6 (why 'share the whole agent' fails), and 7 (absorption bottleneck). The tacit-layer-removed thesis is the Big Idea restated in supplementary register. Fully consistent with the M7 generosity-mood feeding into the exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages room outside text (check_pedagogy.md rule 27).
rules_evaluated.evidence: No authored conversation cues, comparison prompts, pause beats, or 'discuss with neighbor' shapes. The file is a reference read — body is the work. Exception: 'Note on provenance: this is a practitioner taxonomy… not research-convergent. Teach it as design, not field consensus.' at line 97 contains 'Teach it as design' — a trainer-addressed directive in student-facing body. This is a rule-27-adjacent violation (body authors trainer instruction) but it does not author a room-management pause or conversation; it's a credibility caveat. Flagged as TODO under rule 3 (teaching moment) where it has higher signal.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing function in prompts (N/A for supplementary).
rules_evaluated.evidence: Supplementary is a reading artifact with no fenced prompts. Rule does not apply.
Not a lecture. No placement judgment required.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — does not front-run downstream teaching moments.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Section 5 names four sharing strategies conceptually without teaching the mechanics of skill authoring (M4), eval-loop building (M6), or running the M7 exercise (pick a strategy, ship it, see what the receiver experiences). The supplementary is a conceptual primer, not an exercise. No front-running detected.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Hard-grep phrase list (zero-tolerance room-share / contemplative-pause commands).
rules_evaluated.evidence: Grep: none of the banned phrases found — 'tell the person', 'sitting next to you', 'share with your neighbor', 'tell the room', 'sit with', 'take a moment', 'let it land', 'pause and reflect'. Clean.

Lines 62 and 115: 'Research signal: the Access-Trust Gap…' and 'Research signal: the absorption bottleneck…' Both inline (not boxed). The prefix is a consultancy-deck habit but the judge template notes that 'Research signal:' inline is a TODO-tier finding for the writing class, not a storytelling blocking concern. Mood impact at Section 2 was already captured in rule 1 (SOURCE NEEDED drives the 7/10 dip, not the prefix). Flagging as TODO.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Writing class: consider dropping 'Research signal:' prefix and integrating the stat into flowing prose — 'The numbers are stark: 54–95% of enterprises have AI access…'

stealing_the_mood: Section 2: '[SOURCE NEEDED]' inline marker in student-visible body text dips mood to 7/10. SVP HR reads the stat, hits the marker, slightly deflated. Fix is the source pin from the maintainer's open TODO.
